title: valeriana coreana subsp. pseudoumbrosa
intro: Valeriana coreana subsp. pseudoumbrosa is a subspecies of plant in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as the Korean valerian or valerian root. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, anti-anxiety, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Valeriana coreana subsp. pseudoumbrosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of restlessness and irritability. Valeriana coreana subsp. pseudoumbrosa is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
